Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

224 
SRGCL_PRCDR_IND_SW 
LABEL: 
Surgical Procedure Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: The switch indicating whether there were any surgical procedures performed during the beneficiary's 
stay. 
SHORT NAME: PRCDRSW 
LONG NAME: SRGCL_PRCDR_IND_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
0 = No surgery indicated 
1 = Yes surgery indicated 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived by checking for the presence of
